rationale: The citing paper’s core question is private-label umbrella rebranding effects (intrinsic brand strength and marketing-mix elasticities), while the cited paper is about event-level new product introduction competition between NBs and PL tiers, so topical overlap is only broad (PL competition in grocery). The only linkage evidence is one DOI match (reference_index 35) with no in-text citation context, so there is not enough evidence to confidently classify this as clearly mention-only or clearly substantive.
